pi_items.source: Task requires creation of template with this exact name (task.json description and setup_task.sh)

pi_items.verified_value: Fatigue is a general/constitutional symptom appropriate for cardiovascular ROS
pi_items.source: Web search: Cardiovascular ROS templates include constitutional symptoms; medical literature confirms fatigue as part of general health assessment

pi_items.verified_value: Chest pain is a primary cardiovascular ROS symptom
pi_items.source: Web search: ACC (American College of Cardiology) and clinical templates confirm chest pain/discomfort as core cardiovascular ROS item

pi_items.verified_value: Palpitations is a primary cardiovascular ROS symptom
pi_items.source: Web search: Multiple clinical sources and cardiothoracic surgery ROS templates list palpitations as standard cardiovascular assessment item

pi_items.verified_value: Peripheral edema is a primary cardiovascular ROS symptom
pi_items.source: Web search: Clinical ROS templates and cardiothoracic sources confirm peripheral edema/swelling as cardiovascular symptom

pi_items.verified_value: Dyspnea (shortness of breath) is a primary cardiovascular ROS symptom
pi_items.source: Web search: Multiple clinical sources confirm dyspnea on exertion and shortness of breath as core cardiovascular ROS items

pi_items.verified_value: Dyspnea is the medical/clinical term for shortness of breath
pi_items.source: Web search: UpToDate, Mayo Clinic, Cleveland Clinic, NCBI Bookshelf confirm dyspnea as medical terminology for shortness of breath (SOB)

pi_items.verified_value: SOB is the standard medical abbreviation for shortness of breath
pi_items.source: Web search: ACC Healthcare Glossary and medical abbreviation sources confirm SOB as standard abbreviation for shortness of breath

pi_items.verified_value: NOSH ChartingSystem is a real open-source EHR system created by Michael Chen, MD
pi_items.source: Web search: GitHub (shihjay2/nosh2), official NOSH website (noshemr.wordpress.com), MEDFLOSS registry confirm NOSH as legitimate open-source EHR

pi_items.metadata_value: Review of Systems (ROS) template (implied in task description)
pi_items.verified_value: ROS is a standard medical documentation practice for systematic symptom inventory
pi_items.source: Web search: American College of Cardiology, clinical documentation standards, and healthcare billing guidelines confirm ROS as standard medical practice

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a cardiovascular Review of Systems (ROS) template named 'Cardio_Consult' with 5 medically appropriate symptoms: Fatigue (general/constitutional), Chest pain (cardiovascular), Palpitations (cardiovascular), Edema (cardiovascular/peripheral), and Shortness of breath (cardiovascular/dyspnea). All symptoms are verified against clinical standards and medical literature as appropriate for a cardiovascular consultation template. Alternative medical terminology is accurate: Dyspnea and SOB are correct terms for shortness of breath. The environment uses NOSH ChartingSystem, a legitimate open-source EHR created by a physician. Patient data is sourced from Synthea, a synthetic patient data generator. The task operates entirely in a synthetic, containerized environment with no real patient data.
